query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[100].playoffTierType') as t100,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[100].matchupPeriodId') as p100,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[100].winner') as w100,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[101].playoffTierType') as t101,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[101].matchupPeriodId') as p101,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[101].winner') as w101,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[102].playoffTierType') as t102,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[102].matchupPeriodId') as p102,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[102].winner') as w102,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[103].playoffTierType') as t103,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[103].matchupPeriodId') as p103,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[103].winner') as w103
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';
